user.title: ZGK Siechnice
user.description: Configure location to monitor for water network failures and maintenance.

data_description.city: Name of the city or village to monitor, e.g. 'Iwiny'.
data_description.street: Optional street name to narrow results. Leave blank to monitor the whole city.
data_description.days_active: An event posted within this many days is considered active (1–30).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to check for new events, in minutes (5–1440).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ZGK Siechnice
reconfigure.description: Change the monitored city. This will reload the integration.

data_description.city: Name of the city or village to monitor, e.g. 'Iwiny'.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to zgksiechnice.pl. Check your internet connection.

data_description.street: Optional street name to narrow results. Leave blank to monitor the whole city.
data_description.days_active: An event posted within this many days is considered active (1–30).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to check for new events, in minutes (5–1440).
